title: Accept disable case for SVA liveness properties.

features.name: sva_liveness_with_disable_iff
features.description: Code should include an SVA liveness property using s_eventually and nexttime operators with a disable iff clause to control when the assertion is active based on a reset condition
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) disable iff (!rstn) s_eventually nexttime a);
